modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Cannot see Collaborate link in Qualtrics for shared surveys

full_description_text:  
I am having trouble with Qualtrics. I can't find the Collaborate link for surveys that people are trying to share with me. They say they shared them, but I don't see anything in my account.
short_description: Cannot see Collaborate link in Qualtrics for shared surveys
description: I am having trouble with Qualtrics. I can't find the Collaborate link for surveys that people are trying to share with me. They say they shared them, but I don't see anything in my account.
